creator: NTmatter@gmail.com
text:
Configure and Build are successful after modifying the Makefile (line 86)
from:
CONFIGURE_ARGS+=        --with-ldap

To:
CONFIGURE_ARGS+=        --with-ldap=${LOCALBASE}
